text:
Implement the `cachetools` library in the `cachetools/` package of this repository.

Every public class, function signature, and docstring is already stubbed out; all bodies currently raise `NotImplementedError`. The full API specification is in `SPEC.rst`. Implement the package until the entire upstream test suite passes: `python3 -m pytest tests -rA -q`.

Do not modify anything under `tests/`, and do not install or vendor the `cachetools` package from PyPI; write the implementation yourself.
